annotations.text: In the coordinate system defined by the eigenvectors, the unit square is transformed into a rectangle whose width is three and height is one.

annotation.text: In the coordinate system defined by the eigenvectors, multiplying by A stretches by three in the direction of v one and multiplies by negative one in the direction of v two
The stretched and flipped grid of linear combinations of v one and v two
In this coordinate system, the unit square is stretched and flipped
